message.content:
@startuml
participant "Client" as C1
participant "RuleService" as RS
participant "database" as DB1
participant "Client" as C2
participant "RuleService" as RS2
participant "database" as DB2

C1 --> RS : POST api /rule-management/v1/business-rule
RS --> RS : Validate path variable and json body
RS --> RS : Extract data from json
RS --> RS : Set data to entity
RS --> DB1 : Insert data to database
DB2 --> RS : Return result
RS --> C2 : Return result

@enduml
